ToolboxElements.Description: Selects all elements that contain the given substring in their text content.
ToolboxElements.Name: Find Element Containing Text

ToolboxElements.Description: Selects all elements where the text content exactly matches the given value.
ToolboxElements.Name: Find Element By Exact Text

ToolboxElements.Description: Selects elements that have a specific attribute with the given value.
ToolboxElements.Name: Find Element By Attribute

ToolboxElements.Description: Selects elements whose attribute contains the given substring.
ToolboxElements.Name: Find Element By Attribute Contains

ToolboxElements.Description: Selects elements whose attribute value starts with the given prefix.
ToolboxElements.Name: Find Element By Attribute Starts With

ToolboxElements.Description: Selects elements whose attribute value ends with the given suffix.
ToolboxElements.Name: Find Element By Attribute Ends With

ToolboxElements.Description: Selects the root element of the document.
ToolboxElements.Name: Select Root Element

ToolboxElements.Description: Selects all descendant nodes of a specific element.
ToolboxElements.Name: Select All Descendants Of Element

ToolboxElements.Description: Selects child elements with the given name under a specific parent.
ToolboxElements.Name: Select Direct Children

ToolboxElements.Description: Selects the first element matching the given name.
ToolboxElements.Name: Select Element By Position (First)

ToolboxElements.Description: Selects the last element matching the given name.
ToolboxElements.Name: Select Element By Position (Last)

ToolboxElements.Description: Selects the element at the given index (1-based).
ToolboxElements.Name: Select Element By Index

ToolboxElements.Description: Selects all nodes that belong to the specified namespace URI.
ToolboxElements.Name: Select Nodes With Specific Namespace

ToolboxElements.Description: Selects all XML/HTML comments in the document.
ToolboxElements.Name: Select Comments
